review_notes: The functions provided are generally accurate and map well to the NIST AC-3(11) control by focusing on restricting access through RBAC and NetworkPolicies. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but there is room for improvement in terms of specificity and clarity. The functions are technically correct and align with Kubernetes security controls.
title: Access Enforcement - Access enforcement | restrict access to specific information types restrict acce
step1_reasoning: The control AC-3(11) focuses on restricting access to specific information types, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that RBAC policies enforce least privilege and do not grant cluster-admin roles unnecessarily. Additionally, NetworkPolicies can restrict ingress and egress traffic to ensure that access to services and data is tightly controlled.
